subcodes.first_line: This wondrous Day, with the Most Exalted Call, summoneth the people of creation and proclaimeth with most eloquent utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این روز بدیع باعلی الندآء اهل انشا را متذکر مینماید و میفرماید بافصح بیان من
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation
